title: Multi-Tenant ERP CRM Demo
description: Responsive B2B SaaS ERP demo with multi-provider authentication, tenant switching, CRM customer records, and Malaysia LHDN e-Invoice profile context.

schemaEntities: AuditableEntity base with soft deletion and optimistic concurrency
User and UserExternalLogin for email plus Google and Microsoft SSO
Company as tenant workspace with LHDN tax profile
CompanyUser pivot for Admin, Standard, and ReadOnly roles
Customer CRM entity scoped by CompanyId

sections.heading: Dashboard shell
body: The demo shows a post-login multi-tenant dashboard with an active workspace company selector, tenant-specific tax profile, RBAC role, and responsive navigation.

sections.heading: CRM customer list
body: The CRM table displays Registered Name, BRN, TIN, Phone, and Status with responsive scaling from desktop data table to mobile cards.

sections.heading: Authentication
body: The authentication panel demonstrates Google SSO, Microsoft SSO, and traditional company email registration.
